title: HQ Agent Session Response
description: Versioned response envelope emitted by core/scripts/hq-agent-session.sh on every exit path (success and failure).

contractVersion.description: Integer contract version this response conforms to. Absent or non-integer values are rejected.

disposition.description: How the producer should treat this turn outcome.

text.description: Human- or channel-facing body. Empty string is valid for no_reply.

items.description: HQ-root-relative path to a file produced during the turn.

artifacts.description: HQ-root-relative paths of durable artifacts written this turn.
